text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this? My followers love it when I upload pics
of my favorite stuff.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Some seek them out and buy them to match me...
And some people discover me from posts like
these.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's funny how a single post can lead to so
many new connections. ☆
